---
title: "Forest Data Science"
description: "Reproducible forest inventory analysis combining field data, remote sensing, and statistical modelling."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [R, Forest, Remote Sensing]
---

## About

An end-to-end data science pipeline for forest inventory and monitoring — from raw field measurements and LiDAR point clouds to statistical models and publication-ready outputs. Designed for reproducibility.

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [LiDAR]{.badge-skill} [Remote Sensing]{.badge-skill} [Quarto]{.badge-skill}
